mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM medications WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, name, is_active AS isActive, dosage, expected_doses_per_day AS expectedDosesPerDay, created_at AS createdAt FROM medications WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medications (user_id, name, is_active, dosage, expected_doses_per_day, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{isActive}, #{dosage}, #{expectedDosesPerDay}, NOW())
